Wir verwenden optionale Cookies, um Ihre Erfahrung auf unseren Websites zu verbessern, z. B. durch Verbindungen zu sozialen Medien, und um personalisierte Werbung auf der Grundlage Ihrer Online-Aktivitäten anzuzeigen. Wenn Sie optionale Cookies ablehnen, werden nur die Cookies verwendet, die zur Bereitstellung der Dienste erforderlich sind. Sie können Ihre Auswahl ändern, indem Sie am Ende der Seite auf „Cookies verwalten“ klicken. [Datenschutzerklärung](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=521839) [Cookies von Drittanbietern](https://aka.ms/3rdpartycookies)

# Willkommen bei Windows
Wir wissen, dass Sie eine Menge um die Ohren haben. Jeder Tag bringt eine neue Herausforderung. Nun, diese Herausforderungen zu meistern, wird mit Windows 11 einfacher werden.
[ Windows 11 abrufen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/get-windows-11) [ Weiter zur Business-Version ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/business/windows-11-pro)
1 von 3 Neue Features von Windows 11 entdecken
![Windows 11-Suchleiste](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-Windows-11-Search-bar?scl=1)
## Neue Features von Windows 11 entdecken
Windows 11 kennenlernen
Arbeiten Sie intuitiver. Erledigen Sie Dinge schnell. Und haben Sie immer noch Zeit für Spaß. Erfahren Sie, warum Windows 11 das bisher beste Windows ist. 
[ Weitere Informationen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/windows-11)
![Geöffneter PC mit Startmenü auf dem Bildschirm](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-PC-open-with-Start-menu-on-the-screen?scl=1)
## Holen Sie sich das bisher beste Windows
Windows 11 abrufen
Einfach arbeiten, spielen und den Alltag meistern. Verwenden Sie das intuitive Windows 11. 
[ Windows 11 abrufen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/get-windows-11)
![Eine Person, die einen PC auf einen Tisch stellt](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-A-person-setting-a-PC-on-a-table?scl=1)
## Finden Sie den richtigen PC für sich
Ihren PC auswählen
Es gibt für alle einen PC, der zu ihnen passt. Finden Sie heraus, welcher Computer sich ideal in Ihr Leben einfügt. 
[ Einen PC kaufen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/help-me-choose)

## Neue Funktionen von Windows 11
Windows 11 ist leistungsfähiger denn je. Entdecken Sie die neuesten Features, die Ihnen helfen, produktiv und kreativ zu sein und mehr.
![Ein Windows 11 PC mit farbenfroher Blüte und Copilot-Symbol auf dem Bildschirm](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-Windows-11-PC-with-colorful-bloom-Copilot-icon-on-screen-4000x4000?scl=1)
### Ein neues KI-Zeitalter beginnt
Starten Sie mit Ihrem eigenen Copilot+ PC in eine neue Ära der KI-gesteuerten Windows Computer. Die bisher schnellsten und intelligentesten Windows PCs. 
[ Weitere Informationen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/copilot-plus-pcs)
![Ein bunter PC und ein Smartphone auf einem Schreibtisch mit einer Tasse Kaffee und einem Stift](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT_PhoneLink-4000x3000?scl=1)
### Synchronisieren Sie Ihr Smartphone mit dem PC
Mit Microsoft Smartphone-Link können Sie von Ihrem Laptop aus Anrufe erledigen, auf SMS antworten und die Benachrichtigungen Ihres Smartphones überprüfen. 
[ Weitere Informationen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/sync-across-your-devices)
## Windows 11-Features erkunden
KI ist mit mit optimaler Leistung jederzeit zum Greifen nah. Nutzen Sie die Features von Windows 11, um Ihr digitales Leben zu sichern und zu optimieren.
[ Windows 11 kennenlernen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/windows-11)
![Sicherheitsabzeichen mit einem Häkchen](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-Security-badge-with-checkmark-icon?scl=1&fmt=png-alpha)
### Intelligente Sicherheit
Noch bevor Sie Ihren PC starten, ist Windows 11 aktiv. Schützen Sie Ihr Gerät vor Phishing-, Netzwerk- und Cyber-Attacken.
[ Weitere Informationen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/comprehensive-security)
![Illustrierte Sprechblasenperson mit einem Häkchen daneben](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-Acessibility-Illustrated-bubble-person-with-checkmark-next-to-it-icon?scl=1&fmt=png-alpha)
### Windows 11 passt sich an Ihre Arbeitsweise an
Schreiben Sie mit Ihrer eigenen Stimme und passen Sie Ihr digitales Erlebnis an Ihre einzigartigen Audio- und visuellen Anforderungen an. Das Betriebssystem Windows 11 ist für Sie und die Dinge, die Sie lieben, gemacht.
[ Weitere Informationen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/accessibility-features)
![Gaming-Controller](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-Gaming-controller-icon?scl=1&fmt=png-alpha)
### Gaming sah noch nie so gut aus
Tauchen Sie ein in ein kinoreifes Spielerlebnis mit Leistung auf höchstem Niveau, flüssigerer Grafik und natürlicher Beleuchtung. Spielen Sie Next-Gen- und klassische Spiele online mit Windows 11.
[ Weitere Informationen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/windows-11-pc-gaming)
![Abbildung eines Fotos mit Bergen](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-Illustration-photo-with-mountains-icon?scl=1&fmt=png-alpha)
### Kreativität trifft Intelligenz
Nutzen Sie KI, damit Sie sich auf die wichtigsten Momente zu konzentrieren können. Bearbeiten Sie Ihre Fotos und Video mit Windows 11.
[ Weitere Informationen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/photo-movie-editor)
## Starten Sie mit Windows 11
Holen Sie sich die Hilfe, die Sie brauchen, damit der Umstieg auf Windows 11 reibungslos vonstatten geht und Sie alle Vorzüge von Windows genießen können.
![Frau sitzt an einem Tisch und öffnet ihren PC](https://cdn-dynmedia-1.microsoft.com/is/image/microsoftcorp/MSFT-Woman-sitting-at-table-opening-her-PC-3000x4000?scl=1)

Erhalten Sie die richtige Hilfe 
Windows-Support
[ Weitere Informationen ](https://support.microsoft.com/windows)
  * Bildschirmansichten simuliert, Änderungen vorbehalten. Die Verfügbarkeit von Apps und Funktionen kann je nach Region abweichen. 
  * [ 1 ](javascript:void\(0\)) Windows kann Dateien, Einstellungen und Apps von PCs mit Windows 10 und höher sichern. Die Wiederherstellung ist unter Windows 11, Version 22H2, und höher verfügbar. Es können regionale Ausschlüsse und Beschränkungen gelten. 
  * [ 2 ](javascript:void\(0\)) Erfordert ein Microsoft-Konto. Bis zu 5 GB Microsoft-Speicher sind inbegriffen. Für Datenübertragungen von mehr als 5 GB ist ein aktives Microsoft-Abonnement oder eine Testversion erforderlich. 
  * [ 3 ](javascript:void\(0\)) Wenn Sie Apps zum ersten Mal auf Ihrem neuen Windows 11 PC öffnen, werden einige neu installiert. Bei anderen Apps müssen Sie sie möglicherweise manuell vom ursprünglichen App-Anbieter neu installieren. 
  * [ 4 ](javascript:void\(0\)) Die Verwendung der Windows-Sicherung zur Wiederherstellung auf einem Windows 11 PC erfordert, dass Sie sich bei der Ersteinrichtung des Computers mit demselben Microsoft-Konto anmelden, das Sie für die Sicherung des Windows 10 PCs verwendet haben. 


[ Windows 11 abrufen ](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/windows/get-windows-11)

//# sourceURL=wdgGFramework
/**
 * WDG Tagging Framework.
 *
 * Analytics tagging framework for WDG websites.
 *
 * @author WDG Tagging & Analytics Team
 * @version 11.9
 */
if (window.wdgtagging == null) {
  window.wdgtagging = (function () {
    //variables
    var _private = {};
    var _public = {};
    _private.data = {};
    _private.tagsInfoList = [];
    _private.tagsExecuted = [];
    _private.debugLogToConsole = false;
    _private.debugLogMsgs = [];
    _private.storageSupport = false;
    _private.wcpConsentResult = {};
    _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = false;
    _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
    _private.wcpCheck = 0;
    _public.util = {};
    _private.qWcpConsentCallback = [];

    /* Private functions */
    _private.checkTagType = function (elem, tag_type) {
      if (elem == undefined || elem == null || tag_type == undefined || tag_type == null) {
        return false;
      }
      if (_public.util.isjQueryLoaded()) {
        return jQuery(elem).is(tag_type);
      } else {
        return elem.tagName == tag_type.toUpperCase();
      }
    }
    _private.initializeWcp = function () {
      if (_public.util.consentRequired()) {
        _private.wcpConsentResult = { Required: true, Analytics: false, SocialMedia: false, Advertising: false };
      } else {
        //when meta tag "consentRequired" is false or mldcc is MSCC:NR
        _private.wcpConsentResult = { Required: true, Analytics: true, SocialMedia: true, Advertising: true };
        _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
      }
    }

    /*
      * Use this function for red tiger consent decisions
      * awa.getConfig().callback.userConsentDetailsCallback()
    */

    /*
      * Runs a loop to compute wcp value 
    */
    _private.computeWcpStatus = function () {
      if (_public.util.consentRequired()) {
        _private.wcpConsentChecking = true;
        if (typeof window.mldcc != "undefined") {
          if (window.mldcc != "MSCC:NR") {
            _private.wcpConsentResult = {
              Required: true,
              Analytics: (/c1=2/ig).test(window.mldcc),
              SocialMedia: (/c2=2/ig).test(window.mldcc),
              Advertising: (/c3=2/ig).test(window.mldcc)
            }
          }
          _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
          _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
          //processing wcp callback queue
          while (_private.qWcpConsentCallback.length) {
            _private.qWcpConsentCallback.pop().apply(this);
          }
        } else if (typeof window.WcpConsent != "undefined") {
          WcpConsent.onInitCallback(function () {
            _private.wcpConsentResult = window.siteConsent ? window.siteConsent.getConsent() : _private.wcpConsentResult;
            _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
            _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
            //processing wcp callback queue
            while (_private.qWcpConsentCallback.length) {
              _private.qWcpConsentCallback.pop().apply(this);
            }
          });
        } else if (_private.wcpCheck < 10) {
          _private.wcpCheck++;
          setTimeout(function () { _private.doWcpLoopTimeout() }, 500);
        } else {
          _private.wcpConsentResult = null;
          _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
          _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
          //processing wcp callback queue
          while (_private.qWcpConsentCallback.length) {
            _private.qWcpConsentCallback.pop().apply(this);
          }
        }
      } else { // consent is not required
        _private.wcpConsentResult = { Required: true, Analytics: true, SocialMedia: true, Advertising: true };
        _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
        _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
      }
    };

    /*
     * Runs a loop to decide if wcp is available
     */
    _private.doWcpLoopTimeout = function () {
      if (_public.util.consentRequired()) {
        if (_private.wcpConsentCheckDone == false) {
          _private.wcpConsentChecking = true;
          if (typeof window.mldcc != "undefined") {
            if (window.mldcc != "MSCC:NR") {
              _private.wcpConsentResult = {
                Required: true,
                Analytics: (/c1=2/ig).test(window.mldcc),
                SocialMedia: (/c2=2/ig).test(window.mldcc),
                Advertising: (/c3=2/ig).test(window.mldcc)
              }
            }
            _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
            _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
            //processing wcp callback queue
            while (_private.qWcpConsentCallback.length) {
              _private.qWcpConsentCallback.pop().apply(this);
            }
          } else if (typeof window.WcpConsent != "undefined") {
            WcpConsent.onInitCallback(function () {
              _private.wcpConsentResult = window.siteConsent ? window.siteConsent.getConsent() : _private.wcpConsentResult;
              _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
              _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
              //processing wcp callback queue
              while (_private.qWcpConsentCallback.length) {
                _private.qWcpConsentCallback.pop().apply(this);
              }
            });
          } else if (_private.wcpCheck < 20) {
            _private.wcpCheck++;
            setTimeout(function () { _private.doWcpLoopTimeout() }, 500);
          } else {
            _private.wcpConsentResult = null;
            _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
            _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
            //processing wcp callback queue
            while (_private.qWcpConsentCallback.length) {
              _private.qWcpConsentCallback.pop().apply(this);
            }
          }
        } else {
          _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
        }
      } else { // consent is not required
        _private.wcpConsentResult = { Required: true, Analytics: true, SocialMedia: true, Advertising: true };
        _private.wcpConsentCheckDone = true;
        _private.wcpConsentChecking = false;
      }
    };

    _public.util.instanceOfjQuery = function (elem) {

    _public.util.getAttr = function (elem, attr) {

    /*

     *
     * @param {object}   elem     DOM element.
     * @param {string}   attr     Attribute Name.

     */
    _public.util.setAttr = function (elem, attr, val) {

    /*
     * Parses JSON string into a JSON object.
     *
     * @param {string}   jsonString     JSON string.
     */
    _public.util.parseJSON = function (jsonString) {
      if (_public.util.isjQueryLoaded()) {

      }
    };

    /*
     * Triggers custom event.
     *
     * @param {object}   elem     DOM element on which custom event triggered.
     * @param {string}   eventName     Custom event Name.
     */
    _public.util.triggerEvent = function (elem, eventName) {
      var event;
      if (elem == undefined || elem == null) {
        elem = document;
      }
      if (eventName == undefined || eventName == null || typeof eventName !== "string") {
        return false;
      }
      if (_public.util.isjQueryLoaded()) {
        jQuery(elem).trigger(eventName);
      } else {
        if (document.createEvent) {
          event = document.createEvent("HTMLEvents");
          event.initEvent(eventName, true, true);
          event.eventName = eventName;
          elem.dispatchEvent(event);
        } else {
          event = document.createEventObject();
          event.eventName = eventName;
          event.eventType = eventName;
          elem.fireEvent("on" + event.eventType, event);
        }
      }
    };
    /*
     * Loads a JavaScript file from specified URL.
     *
     * @param {string}   url     URL of JavaScript file.
     */
    _public.util.insertScript = function (url, async) {
      async = async || false;
      script = document.createElement('script');
      script.type = 'text/javascript';
      script.async = async;
      script.src = url;
      document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(script);
    };

    /*
     * Loads a JavaScript file from specified URL and executes a callback function on load.
     *
     * @param {string}    url       URL of JavaScript file.
     * @param {function}  callback  Callback function.
     */
    _public.util.insertScriptCallback = function (url, callback, async) {
      async = async || false;
      script = document.createElement('script');
      script.type = 'text/javascript';
      script.async = async;
      script.src = url;
      if (typeof (callback) === "function") {
        script.onreadystatechange = script.onload = function () {
          try {
            callback.call(this);
          } catch (err) {
            console.error(err);
          }
        };
      }
      document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(script);
    };

    /*
     * Trim string.
     *
     * @return {array} returns string.
     */
    _public.util.trim = function (val) {
      if (!val) {
        return val;
      }
      if (_public.util.isjQueryLoaded() && jQuery.trim) {
        val = jQuery.trim(val);
      } else if (String.prototype.trim) {
        val = val.trim();
      } else {
        return val.replace(/^[\s\uFEFF\xA0]+|[\s\uFEFF\xA0]+$/g, '');
      }
      val = val.replace(/\s\s+/g, ' ');
      return val;
    };

    /*
     * Gets trimmed and lower case value. Returns default value in case value is null.
     *
     * @param {string}   val   string value.
     * @param {string}   def   default value.
     *
     * @return {string} returns string value.
     */
    _public.util.tlcStr = function (val, def) {
      if (!val) {
        val = def || "";
      } else if (typeof val == "string") {
        val = val.toLowerCase();
      } else if (typeof val == "object" && _public.util.instanceOfjQuery(val)) {
        val = val.text().toLowerCase();
      } else {
        val = val.toString().toLowerCase();
      }
      val = _public.util.trim(val);
      if (!val) {
        val = def || "";
      }
      return val;
    };
    /*
     * Gets escape (>), trimmed and lower case value. Returns default value in case value is null.
     *
     * @param {string}   val   string value.
     * @param {string}   def   default value.
     *
     * @return {string} returns string value.
     */
    _public.util.etlcStr = function (val, def) {
      val = _public.util.tlcStr(val, def);
      val = val.replace(/\>/ig, "");
      if (!val) {
        val = def || "";
      }
      val = _public.util.trim(val);
      return val;
    };
    /*
   * Excludes selector element.
   *
   * @param {object}   elem   Element.
   * @param {string}   sel   selector.
   *
   * @return {string} returns content value.
   */
    _public.util.excludeSelector = function (elem, sel) {
      if (elem && sel && window.wdgtagging.util.isjQueryLoaded()) {
        return jQuery(elem).clone().find(sel).remove().end();
      }
      return elem;
    };

    /*
     * Gets meta tag content value.
     *
     * @param {string}   name   meta tag name.
     *
     * @return {string} returns content value.
     */
    _public.util.getMetaTagContent = function (name) {
      if (_public.util.isjQueryLoaded() && name) {
        return jQuery("meta[name='" + name + "']").attr("content") || null;
      } else if (name && document.querySelector && document.querySelector("meta[name='" + name + "']")) {
        return document.querySelector("meta[name='" + name + "']").getAttribute("content");
      }
      return null;
    };

    /*
     * Sets meta tag content.
     *
     * @param {string}   name     meta tag name.
     * @param {string}   content  content value.
     */
    _public.util.setMetaTag = function (name, content) {
      if (!name || !content) {
        return;
      }
      if (_public.util.isjQueryLoaded()) {
        if (jQuery("meta[name='" + name + "']").length > 0) {
          jQuery("meta[name='" + name + "']").attr("content", content);
        } else {
          jQuery("head").append("<meta name='" + name + "' content='" + content + "'>");
        }
      } else {
        if (document.querySelector && document.querySelector("meta[name='" + name + "']")) {
          document.querySelector("meta[name='" + name + "']").setAttribute("content", content);
        } else {
          var meta = document.createElement('meta');
          meta.name = name;
          meta.content = content;
          document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(meta);
        }
      }
    };

    /*
     * Creates cookie with provided name, value & expiration.
     *
     * @param {string}   name     Name of cookie.
     * @param {string}   value    Value of cookie.
     * @param {number}   content  No of expiration days.
     */
    _public.util.createCookie = function (name, value, days) {
      var expires;
      if (days) {
        var date = new Date();
        date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
        expires = "; expires=" + date.toGMTString();
      } else {
        expires = "";
      }
      document.cookie = name + "=" + value + expires + "; path=/";
    };

    /*
     * Gets cookie value.
     *
     * @param {string}   name   Name of cookie.
     *
     * @return {string} returns cookie value.
     */
    _public.util.readCookie = function (name) {
      var nameEQ = name + "=";
      var ca = document.cookie.split(';');
      for (var i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
        var c = ca[i];
        while (c.charAt(0) == ' ')
          c = c.substring(1, c.length);
        if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0)
          return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);
      }
      return null;
    };

    /*
     * Deletes the cookie.
     *
     * @param {string}   name     Name of cookie.
     */
    _public.util.deleteCookie = function (name) {
      _public.util.createCookie(name, "", -1);
    };

    /*
     * Gets Query string parameter value from a provided URL or current page URL.
     *
     * @param {string}   name   Name of Querystring parameter.
     * @param {string}   url   URL. If not provided, current page URL is used.
     *
     * @return {string} returns Querystring parameter value.
     */
    _public.util.getQueryParam = function (name, url) {
      url = url || window.location.href;
      return decodeURIComponent(url.replace(new RegExp("^(?:.*[&\\?]" + encodeURIComponent(name).replace(/[\.\+\*]/g, "\\$&") + "(?:\\=([^&]*))?)?.*$", "i"), "$1"));
    };

    /*
     * Extends JSON objects.
     *
     * @param {string}   obj1     First Object.
     * @param {string}   obj2     Second Object.
     *
     * Return first object
     */
    _public.util.extendObj = function (obj1, obj2) {
      if (window.wdgtagging.util.isjQueryLoaded()) {
        jQuery.extend(obj1, obj2);
      } else if (Object.assign) {
        Object.assign(obj1, obj2);
      } else {
        for (var key in obj2) {
          if (obj2.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
            obj1[key] = obj2[key];
          }
        }
      }
      return obj1;
    };

    /*
     * Gets MSCC Consent status
     *
     * returns true or false
     */
    _public.util.isMSCCConsent = function () {
      // returns true or false
      // If mscc object is present, return mscc.hasContent() value.
      // If in an iframe - return false
      try {
        if (window.self !== window.top) {
          return "0";
        }
      } catch (e) {
        //if there is an error it will be a cross domain error caused by being in an iframe
        return "0";
      }

      if (typeof (window.mscc) !== "undefined" && typeof (window.mscc.hasConsent) === "function" && !window.mscc.hasConsent()) {
        return "0";
      } else {
        return "1";
      }
    };

      return skipCCPACheck;

        if (typeof (GPC_DataSharingOptIn) === "boolean") {
          CCPAConsentStatus = GPC_DataSharingOptIn;
        }

    /*
     * Gets Consent required status
     *
     * returns true or false
     */
    _public.util.consentRequired = function () {
      // returns true or false based on data we will get from the page
      //logic w.r.t Content team implementation for consent required
      if (_public.util.getMetaTagContent("consentRequired") != null) {
        return (_public.util.getMetaTagContent("consentRequired").toLowerCase() == "true");
      } else if (typeof window.mldcc != "undefined") {
        return (window.mldcc != "MSCC:NR"); // returns true if cookie consent is required, return false if cookie consent is not required
      } else {
        //Fallback logic for dev testing
        return (_public.util.getQueryParam("consent") == "false" ? false : true);
      }
    };

    /*
     * Gets Product information from DOM element.
     *
     * @param {object}   elem     DOM element.
     *
     * @return {object} returns Product Info object.
     */
    _public.util.getProductInfo = function (elem) {
      try {
        if (_public.util.instanceOfjQuery(elem)) {
          elem = elem[0];
        }
        var original_elem = elem;
        var isJqueryLoaded = this.isjQueryLoaded();
        var isA = this.isA(elem);
        var data_js_href = this.getAttr(elem, "data-js-href");
        if (!isA && data_js_href && data_js_href != "") {
          var data_js_href_elem = document.createElement("A");
          data_js_href_elem.href = data_js_href;
          data_js_href_elem.setAttribute("data-js-href-flag", "true");
          elem = data_js_href_elem;
          isA = this.isA(elem);
        }
        var productInfo = {
          "id": null,
          "sku": null,
          "name": null,
          "retailer": null,
          "cta": null
        };
        var tmp;
        if (isA) {
          var pathname = elem.pathname;
          var hostname = elem.hostname;
          var search = elem.search;
          if (pathname.match(/onerf\/signin/i)) {
            var temp_A = document.createElement("a");
            temp_A.href = this.getQueryParam("ru", search);
            if (temp_A) {
              pathname = temp_A.pathname || "";
              search = temp_A.search || "";
            }
          }
          if (pathname.match(/productID/i)) {
            tmp = pathname.split("productID");
            productInfo.id = tmp.length > 0 ? tmp[1] : null;

/**
 * MLSD PI: Cookie Insights Tracking.
 *
 * @author  WDG Tagging & Analytics Team
 * @since   04-10-2021
 * @version 1.1
 */
if (window.wdgtagging !== null) {
  (function (wdg, tu, $) {
    var CookieStatusInsights = "";
    window.wdgtagging.getCookieStatusInsights = function () {
      var MSCCCookieValue = tu.readCookie("MSCC");
      if (tu.getMetaTagContent("consentRequired") != null) {
        if (tu.getMetaTagContent("consentRequired").toLowerCase() == "false") {
          CookieStatusInsights = (MSCCCookieValue != null && MSCCCookieValue.match(/c1=2-c2=2-c3=2/ig) != null && MSCCCookieValue.match(/c1=2-c2=2-c3=2/ig).length >= 1) ? "anlytcs,Accept;social,Accept;advert,Accept" : "MSCC:NR";
        }
        else if (tu.getMetaTagContent("consentRequired").toLowerCase() == "true") {
          if (MSCCCookieValue == null) {
            CookieStatusInsights = "anlytcs,Ignrd;social,Ignrd;advert,Ignrd";
          }
          else if (MSCCCookieValue.match(/cid/ig) != null && MSCCCookieValue.match(/cid/ig).length >= 1) {
            var MSCCCookieSplit = MSCCCookieValue.split("-");
            var cValues = {};
            var convertVal = { 0: "Ignrd", 1: "Reject", 2: "Accept" }
            for (i = 0; i < MSCCCookieSplit.length; i++) {
              var cVal = MSCCCookieSplit[i].split("=");
              cValues[cVal[0]] = convertVal[cVal[1]];
            }
            CookieStatusInsights = "anlytcs," + cValues['c1'] + ";social," + cValues['c2'] + ";advert," + cValues['c3'];
          }
          else {
            CookieStatusInsights = "CValues Not Present";
          }
        }
      }
      else if (typeof window.mldcc != "undefined") {
        if (window.mldcc == "MSCC:NR") {
          CookieStatusInsights = "MSCC:NR";
        }
        else if (window.mldcc.match(/MSCC:c1/ig) != null && window.mldcc.match(/MSCC:c1/ig).length >= 1) {
          var MSCCCookieSplit = window.mldcc.split(":")[1].split("-");
          var cValues = {};
          var convertVal = { 0: "Ignrd", 1: "Reject", 2: "Accept" }
          for (i = 0; i < MSCCCookieSplit.length; i++) {
            var cVal = MSCCCookieSplit[i].split("=");
            cValues[cVal[0]] = convertVal[cVal[1]];
          }
          CookieStatusInsights = "anlytcs," + cValues['c1'] + ";social," + cValues['c2'] + ";advert," + cValues['c3'];
        }
        else {
          //Added for testing
          CookieStatusInsights = "CValues Not Present";
        }
      }
      else {
        //Added for testing
        CookieStatusInsights = "CValues Not Present";
      }
      return CookieStatusInsights + ((_satellite.getVar("CMS") != 'undefined') ? "||CMS:" + _satellite.getVar("CMS") : "");
    }
  })(window.wdgtagging, window.wdgtagging.util, window.jQuery);
}

        "linkedin.com",

        "live.com",
        "xbox.com",
        "skype.com",

        "trafficmanager.net",
        "windows.net",
        "aka.ms",
        "slideshare.net",
        "azure.com",
        "blogs.windows.com",
        "azurewebsites.net",
        "insider.windows.com",
        "javascript:void(0);",
        "youtube.com",
        "xbox.cn",
        "onerf.xbox.cn",
        "xbox.com",
        "weibo.com",
        "weixin.qq.com",
        "clouddamcdnprodep.azureedge.net",
        "microsoftedge.github.io",
        "ms-settings:",
        "ms-photos:",
        "ms-windows-store",
        "ms-phone",
        "app.adjust.com",
        "play.google.com",
        "itunes.apple.com",
        "apps.apple",
        "apple.com\/itunes",
        "microsoftstore.com.cn/surfacegosignup",
        "img-prod-cms-rt-microsoft-com.akamaized.net",
        "flightsimulator.com/",
        "it.nc.gov",
        ".pdf",
        "idsa.org",
        "mktoevents.com",
        "safelinks.protection.outlook.com"
      ];

      var isBlackList = function (link) {
        if (link === "") {
          return false;
        }
        var result = false;
        link = tu.trim(link.toLowerCase());
        if (link === "#") {
          result = true;
        } else {
          for (var i = 0; i < referralBlackListURL.length; i++) {
            if (link.indexOf(referralBlackListURL[i]) > -1) {
              result = true;
              break;
            }
          }
        }
        return result;
      };
      if (tu.instanceOfjQuery(elem)) {
        elem = elem[0];
      }
      var data_m = tu.getAttr(elem, "data-m");
      if (data_m) {
        var productInfo = tu.getProductInfo(elem);
        var domain, link, prodName, prodId, prodSku;
        var referral = false;
        var partnerName = null;
        prodName = productInfo.name;
        prodId = productInfo.id;
        prodSku = productInfo.sku;
        if (tu.getAttr(elem, "href")) {
          link = elem.href;
          domain = elem.hostname;
        } else {
          var tempA = document.createElement("a");
          tempA.href = tu.getAttr(elem, "data-js-href");
          link = tempA.href;
          domain = tempA.hostname;
        }
        if (link && domain) {
          if (domain.match(/microsoft\.com/i) && (link.match(/(microsoftstore|microsoftestore)/i) || link.match(/\/store\//i) || link.match(/(..-..|..-.*)?\/(p|d)\//i))) {
            referral = true;
            partnerName = "ms store";
          } else if (!domain.match(/microsoft\.com/i) && !isBlackList(link)) {
            partnerName = domain;
            referral = true;
          }
          if (referral) {
            var targetJSON = JSON.parse(data_m);
            targetJSON.prtnm = partnerName;
            targetJSON.bhvr = "PARTNERREFERRAL";
            targetJSON.prod = prodName;
            targetJSON.pid = prodId;
            targetJSON.sku = prodSku;
            tu.setAttr(elem, "data-m", JSON.stringify(targetJSON));
            //This is here to signal that we are customizing the element so Red Tiger knows
            tu.setAttr(elem, "data-wdg-behavior", "PARTNERREFERRAL");
          }
        }
      }
    };

    /*
     * Sets JSLLShim Partner Referral tracking.
     *
     */
    _public.TagReferralLinkRT = function (elem) {
      var referralBlackListURL = [
        "facebook.com",
        "instagram.com",
        "linkedin.com",
        "twitter.com",
        "office.com",
        "live.com",
        "xbox.com",
        "skype.com",
        "onenote.com",
        "atdmt.com",
        "msdn.com",
        "trafficmanager.net",
        "windows.net",
        "aka.ms",
        "slideshare.net",
        "azure.com",
        "blogs.windows.com",
        "azurewebsites.net",
        "insider.windows.com",
        "javascript:void(0);",
        "youtube.com",
        "xbox.cn",
        "onerf.xbox.cn",
        "xbox.com",
        "weibo.com",
        "weixin.qq.com",
        "clouddamcdnprodep.azureedge.net",
        "microsoftedge.github.io",
        "ms-settings:",
        "ms-photos:",
        "ms-windows-store",
        "ms-phone",
        "app.adjust.com",
        "play.google.com",
        "itunes.apple.com",
        "apps.apple",
        "apple.com\/itunes",
        "microsoftstore.com.cn/surfacegosignup",
        "img-prod-cms-rt-microsoft-com.akamaized.net",
        "flightsimulator.com/",
        "it.nc.gov",
        ".pdf",
        "idsa.org",
        "mktoevents.com",
        "safelinks.protection.outlook.com"
      ];

      var isBlackList = function (link) {
        if (link === "") {
          return false;
        }
        var result = false;
        link = tu.trim(link.toLowerCase());
        if (link === "#") {
          result = true;
        } else {
          for (var i = 0; i < referralBlackListURL.length; i++) {
            if (link.indexOf(referralBlackListURL[i]) > -1) {
              result = true;
              break;
            }
          }
        }
        return result;
      };
      if (tu.instanceOfjQuery(elem)) {
        elem = elem[0];
      }
      var data_m = tu.getAttr(elem, "data-m");
      if (data_m) {
        var productInfo = tu.getProductInfo(elem);
        var domain, link, prodName, prodId, prodSku;
        var referral = false;
        var partnerName = null;
        prodName = productInfo.name;
        prodId = productInfo.id;
        prodSku = productInfo.sku;
        if (tu.getAttr(elem, "href")) {
          link = elem.href;
          domain = elem.hostname;
        } else {
          var tempA = document.createElement("a");
          tempA.href = tu.getAttr(elem, "data-js-href");
          link = tempA.href;
          domain = tempA.hostname;
        }
        if (link && domain) {
          if (domain.match(/microsoft\.com/i) && (link.match(/\/store\//i) || link.match(/(..-..|..-.*)?\/(p|d)\//i))) {
            referral = true;
            partnerName = "ms store";
          } else if (!domain.match(/microsoft\.com/i) && !isBlackList(link)) {
            partnerName = domain;
            referral = true;
          }
          if (referral) {
            var targetJSON = JSON.parse(data_m);
            targetJSON.prtnm = partnerName;
            targetJSON.bhvr = "PARTNERREFERRAL";
            targetJSON.prod = prodName;
            targetJSON.pid = prodId;
            targetJSON.sku = prodSku;
            tu.setAttr(elem, "data-m", JSON.stringify(targetJSON));
            //This is here to signal that we are customizing the element so Red Tiger knows
            tu.setAttr(elem, "data-wdg-behavior", "PARTNERREFERRAL");
          }
        }
      }
    };

    /*
     * Returns jconfig if awa(JSLLShim) has been loaded
     */
    _public.getJconfig = function () {
      if (_private.JSLLShimReady) {
        return _private.jconfig;
      } else {
        return false;
      }
    };

    //Initializes
    wdg.addTagInfo(_private.tagName, "2021Dec-v1");

    return _public;
  })(window.wdgtagging, window.wdgtagging.util, window.wdgtagging.data);
}

    /*
     * Sets oneds Partner Referral tracking.
     *
     */
    _public.TagReferralLinkRT = function (elem) {
      var referralBlackListURL = [
        "facebook.com",
        "instagram.com",
        "linkedin.com",
        "twitter.com",
        "office.com",
        "live.com",
        "xbox.com",
        "skype.com",
        "onenote.com",
        "atdmt.com",
        "msdn.com",
        "trafficmanager.net",
        "windows.net",
        "aka.ms",
        "slideshare.net",
        "azure.com",
        "blogs.windows.com",
        "azurewebsites.net",
        "insider.windows.com",
        "javascript:void(0);",
        "youtube.com",
        "xbox.cn",
        "onerf.xbox.cn",
        "xbox.com",
        "weibo.com",
        "weixin.qq.com",
        "clouddamcdnprodep.azureedge.net",
        "microsoftedge.github.io",
        "ms-settings:",
        "ms-photos:",
        "ms-windows-store",
        "ms-phone",
        "app.adjust.com",
        "play.google.com",
        "itunes.apple.com",
        "apps.apple",
        "apple.com\/itunes",
        "microsoftstore.com.cn/surfacegosignup",
        "img-prod-cms-rt-microsoft-com.akamaized.net",
        "flightsimulator.com/",
        "it.nc.gov",
        ".pdf",
        "idsa.org"
      ];

      var isBlackList = function (link) {
        if (link === "") {
          return false;
        }
        var result = false;
        link = tu.trim(link.toLowerCase());
        if (link === "#") {
          result = true;
        } else {
          for (var i = 0; i < referralBlackListURL.length; i++) {
            if (link.indexOf(referralBlackListURL[i]) > -1) {
              result = true;
              break;
            }
          }
        }
        return result;
      };
      if (tu.instanceOfjQuery(elem)) {
        elem = elem[0];
      }
      var data_m = tu.getAttr(elem, "data-m");
      if (data_m) {
        var productInfo = tu.getProductInfo(elem);
        var domain, link, prodName, prodId, prodSku;
        var referral = false;
        var partnerName = null;
        prodName = productInfo.name;
        prodId = productInfo.id;
        prodSku = productInfo.sku;
        if (tu.getAttr(elem, "href")) {
          link = elem.href;
          domain = elem.hostname;
        } else {
          var tempA = document.createElement("a");
          tempA.href = tu.getAttr(elem, "data-js-href");
          link = tempA.href;
          domain = tempA.hostname;
        }
        if (link && domain) {
          if (domain.match(/microsoft\.com/i) && (link.match(/\/store\//i) || link.match(/(..-..|..-.*)?\/(p|d)\//i))) {
            referral = true;
            partnerName = "ms store";
          } else if (!domain.match(/microsoft\.com/i) && !isBlackList(link)) {
            partnerName = domain;
            referral = true;
          }
          if (referral) {
            var targetJSON = JSON.parse(data_m);
            targetJSON.prtnm = partnerName;
            targetJSON.bhvr = "PARTNERREFERRAL";
            targetJSON.prod = prodName;
            targetJSON.pid = prodId;
            targetJSON.sku = prodSku;
            tu.setAttr(elem, "data-m", JSON.stringify(targetJSON));
            //This is here to signal that we are customizing the element so Red Tiger knows
            tu.setAttr(elem, "data-wdg-behavior", "PARTNERREFERRAL");
          }
        }
      }
    };

    //Initializes
    wdg.addTagInfo(_private.tagName, "2020jun30-v1");

    return _public;
  })(window.wdgtagging, window.wdgtagging.util, window.wdgtagging.data);
}

    var _public = {};
    _private.baseUrl = "//ad.doubleclick.net/ddm/activity/";
    _private.ordRandomEndSrc = ";dc_lat=;dc_rdid=;tag_for_child_directed_treatment=;ord=";
    _private.ord1NumRandomEndSrc = ";dc_lat=;dc_rdid=;tag_for_child_directed_treatment=;ord=1;num=";
    _private.randomEnding = _private.ordRandomEndSrc;
    _private.tagName = "DCM";

    //------------------------Private functions-----------------------------------------
    /*
     * Sets Base DCM Variables
     *
     * @param {object}   elem     DOM element.
     */
    _private.setBaseUVars = function (elem, override) {
      _private.uVars = _private.uVars || {};
      _private.setUVar("u1", wdg.getData("loc") || '', false);
      _private.setUVar("u2", wdg.getData("langLoc") || '', false);
      _private.setUVar("u6", (wdg.getData("gpn") || "").replace(/\//g, '-') || '', false);
      _private.setUVar("u26", (document.title || "").split("|")[0], true);


      if (elem) {
        _private.setProdUVars(elem);
        /* CTA(u50) */
        _private.uVars.u50 = null;
        var eTxt = null;
        var productInfo = tu.getProductInfo(elem);
        eTxt = productInfo.cta;
        if (!eTxt) {
          eTxt = tu.getTextContent(elem);
        }
        eTxt = tu.etlcStr(eTxt, null);
        if (eTxt) {
          _private.setUVar("u50", eTxt, true);
        }
      }
      if (override != undefined && override != null && typeof (override) == "object") {
        _private.uVars = tu.extendObj(_private.uVars, override);
      }
    };

    /*
     * Sets Product DCM Variables
     *
     * @param {object}   elem     DOM element.
     */
    _private.setProdUVars = function (elem) {
      var productInfo = tu.getProductInfo(elem);
      _private.setUVar("u25", productInfo.id, true);
      _private.setUVar("u32", productInfo.sku, true);
      _private.setUVar("u26", productInfo.name, true);
      _private.setUVar("u56", productInfo.retailer, true);
    };

    /*
     * Sets DCM Variable
     *
     * @param {string}   uVar     Variable Name.
     * @param {string}   value    Variable Value.
     * @param {boolen}   override Flag for overriding variable value.
     */
    _private.setUVar = function (uVar, value, override) {
      if (!uVar) {
        return false;
      }
      if (!override) {
        if (_private.uVars[uVar]) {
          return false;
        }
      }
      _private.uVars[uVar] = ((value === null || value === undefined) ? null : encodeURIComponent(tu.trim(value)));
    };

    /*
     * Get DCM tracking string
     *
     * @param {string}   src    DCM Source value.
     * @param {string}   type   DCM Type value.
     * @param {string}   cat    DCM Category value.
     * @param {object}   elem   DOM element (Optional). Available in case of Link click.
     *
     * @return {string} returns DCM tracking string.
     */
    _private.getDcmString = function (src, type, cat, override, elem) {
      _private.setBaseUVars(elem, override);
      var s = _private.baseUrl + "src=" + src + ";type=" + type + ";cat=" + cat + _private.getUVarString();
      return s;
    };

    /*
     * Gets DCM Variable string.
     *
     * @return {string} returns DCM variable string.
     */
    _private.getUVarString = function () {
      var u = _private.uVars;
      var uVarString = '';
      for (var key in u) {
        if (u.hasOwnProperty(key) && u[key] !== null) {
          uVarString += ";" + key + "=" + u[key];
        }
      }
      uVarString += _private.getRandomEndSrc();
      return uVarString;
    };

    /*
     * Gets Random Number
     *
     * @return {number} returns random number.
     */
    _private.getRandomNbr = function () {
      var r = Math.random() + "";
      r = r * 10000000000000;
      return r;
    };

    /*
     * Gets Random End string
     *
     * @return {string} returns random end string.
     */
    _private.getRandomEndSrc = function () {
      return _private.randomEnding + _private.getRandomNbr();
    };

    /*
     * Gets Conditioned DCM Variable
     *
     * @param {string}   name  DCM Variable name.
     * @param {string}   val   DCM Variable value.
     *
     * @return {object} returns DCM variable.
     */
    _private.condStr = function (name, val) {
      if (name && val) {
        return ";" + name + "=" + val;
      }
      return "";
    };

    //------------------------Public functions-----------------------------------------
    /*
     * Set Ord Random ending
     *
     */
    _public.setOrdRandomEnding = function () {
      _private.randomEnding = _private.ordRandomEndSrc;
    };

    /*
     * Set Ord1 Num Random ending
     *
     */
    _public.setOrd1NumRandomEnding = function () {
      _private.randomEnding = _private.ord1NumRandomEndSrc;
    };

    /*
     * Tracks DCM Page view
     *
     * @param {string}   src    DCM Source value.
     * @param {string}   type   DCM Type value.
     * @param {string}   cat    DCM Category value.
     */
    _public.trackView = function (src, type, cat, override) {
      var s = _private.getDcmString(src, type, cat, override, null);
      tu.requestImage(s);
      wdg.addTagExecuted(_private.tagName, "View");
    };

    /*
     * Tracks DCM Page view
     *
     * @param {string}   src    DCM Source value.
     * @param {string}   type   DCM Type value.
     * @param {string}   cat    DCM Category value.
     * @param {object}   elem   DOM element.
     */
    _public.trackEvent = function (src, type, cat, override, elem) {
      var s = _private.getDcmString(src, type, cat, override, elem);
      tu.requestImage(s);
      wdg.addTagExecuted(_private.tagName, "Conversion");
    };

    //Initializes
    wdg.addTagInfo(_private.tagName, "2018apr30-v1");

    return _public;
  })(window.wdgtagging, window.wdgtagging.util);
}

/**
 * WDG Global Data Layer.

    try {
      /**

       * @todo Delete:2021-03-30
       * for HCL. Since the accessibility checker is throwing a false positive for them we have fixed it using the code below.Need to check again in March if the issue is resolved from Adobe.
       */
      $(".at-flicker-control").slice(1).remove();

      var env, langLoc, lang, loc, gpn;
      env = (window.location.host === "www.microsoft.com") ? "prod" : "staging";

      //Market - LangLoc
      var tPNSplits = window.location.pathname.toLowerCase().split("/");
      var i = (env === "prod" ? 1 : 2);
      //RedTiger Staging environment condition
      if (env === "staging" && (window.location.hostname === "marketingsites-prod.microsoft.com" || window.location.hostname === "edge.dev.im.microsoft.com" || window.location.hostname === "windows.preview.microsoft.com")) {
        i = 1;
      }
      langLoc = tPNSplits[i];

      if (!langLoc) {
        lang = "";
        loc = "";
      } else if (langLoc.match(/^..-.*-..$/)) {
        //special case for sr-latn-rn
        lang = langLoc.split("-")[0];
        loc = langLoc.split("-")[2];
      } else if (langLoc.match(/^..-.*$/)) {
        //also includes en-westindies
        lang = langLoc.split("-")[0];
        loc = langLoc.split("-")[1];
      } else {
        lang = "";
        loc = "";
      }

      //Page name
      i = i + 2;
      gpn = tu.tlcStr(tPNSplits[i], "homepage");
      if (gpn !== "homepage") {
        i++;
        while (i < tPNSplits.length) {
          gpn += "/" + tPNSplits[i];
          i++;
        }
        gpn = tu.tlcStr(gpn).replace(/[\-_]/g, ' ');
      }

      wdg.setData("env", env);
      wdg.setData("langLoc", langLoc);
      wdg.setData("lang", lang);
      wdg.setData("loc", loc);
      wdg.setData("gpn", gpn);
    } catch (err) {
      tu.debugLog("Error in MldDataLayer configuration. error: " + err);

<section data-vg="Footnotes" aria-label="Fußnoten: Haftungsausschluss" class="article-section-footnotes disclaimer pt-3 pb-3 theme-dark" id="Footnotes-panel-11">
    <div data-grid="container">
        <div data-grid="col-12">
            <ul>
                    <li class="c-caption-2 x-hidden-focus">

                        Bildschirmansichten simuliert, Änderungen vorbehalten. Die Verfügbarkeit von Apps und Funktionen kann je nach Region abweichen.
                    </li>
                    <li class="c-caption-2 x-hidden-focus">

                            <a aria-label="Zurück zum Verweis von Fußnote 1" href="javascript:void(0)" class="c-hyperlink supLink" id="1">
                                <span class="supFn">1</span>
                            </a>
                        Windows kann Dateien, Einstellungen und Apps von PCs mit Windows 10 und höher sichern. Die Wiederherstellung ist unter Windows 11, Version 22H2, und höher verfügbar. Es können regionale Ausschlüsse und Beschränkungen gelten.
                    </li>
                    <li class="c-caption-2 x-hidden-focus">

                            <a aria-label="Zurück zum Verweis von Fußnote 2" href="javascript:void(0)" class="c-hyperlink supLink" id="2">
                                <span class="supFn">2</span>
                            </a>
                        Erfordert ein Microsoft-Konto. Bis zu 5 GB Microsoft-Speicher sind inbegriffen. Für Datenübertragungen von mehr als 5 GB ist ein aktives Microsoft-Abonnement oder eine Testversion erforderlich.
                    </li>
                    <li class="c-caption-2 x-hidden-focus">

                            <a aria-label="Zurück zu Fußnote-3-Referrer" href="javascript:void(0)" class="c-hyperlink supLink" id="3">
                                <span class="supFn">3</span>
                            </a>
                        Wenn Sie Apps zum ersten Mal auf Ihrem neuen Windows 11 PC öffnen, werden einige neu installiert. Bei anderen Apps müssen Sie sie möglicherweise manuell vom ursprünglichen App-Anbieter neu installieren.
                    </li>
                    <li class="c-caption-2 x-hidden-focus">

                            <a aria-label="Zurück zu Fußnote-4-Referrer" href="javascript:void(0)" class="c-hyperlink supLink" id="4">
                                <span class="supFn">4</span>
                            </a>
                        Die Verwendung der Windows-Sicherung zur Wiederherstellung auf einem Windows 11 PC erfordert, dass Sie sich bei der Ersteinrichtung des Computers mit demselben Microsoft-Konto anmelden, das Sie für die Sicherung des Windows 10 PCs verwendet haben.
                    </li>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>

<script id="uhf-footer-ccpa">
    const globalPrivacyControlEnabled = navigator.globalPrivacyControl;

    const GPC_DataSharingOptIn = (globalPrivacyControlEnabled) ? false : checkThirdPartyAdsOptOutCookie();

    if(window.onGPCLoaded) {
        window.onGPCLoaded();
    }
    
    function checkThirdPartyAdsOptOutCookie() {
        try {
            const ThirdPartyAdsOptOutCookieName = '3PAdsOptOut';
            var cookieValue = getCookie(ThirdPartyAdsOptOutCookieName);
            return cookieValue != 1;
        } catch {
            return true;
        }
    }

    function getCookie(cookieName) {
        var cookieValue = document.cookie.match('(^|;)\\s*' + cookieName + '\\s*=\\s*([^;]+)');
        return (cookieValue) ? cookieValue[2] : '';
    }
</script>

        WcpConsent.init("de-de", "cookie-banner", function (err, _siteConsent) {
            if (err != undefined) {
                return error;
            } else {
                siteConsent = _siteConsent;
            }
        }, onConsentChanged);
        window.getCookie = function (name) {
        	var match = document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(^| )' + name + '=([^;]+)'));
        	if (match) return match[2];
        }
        function onConsentChanged() {
            var msccvalue = window.getCookie("MSCC");
            window.mldcc = "MSCC:" + GetCategoryFromMSCC(msccvalue.toLowerCase());
        }

        $(window).on('load', function (e) {
            ShowHideManageCookies('Manage cookies');
        });
        /* updating cookie when user hit back button */
        function checkAndUpdateMLDCC() {
            var msccCookieValue = window.getCookie("MSCC");
            if (msccCookieValue && msccCookieValue.indexOf('c1=') != -1) {
                var mldccFromCookie = "c1=" + msccCookieValue.split('c1=')[1];
                if (mldccFromCookie !== window.mldcc.split(":")[1]) {
                    var intervalId = setInterval(() => {
                        onConsentChanged();
                        if (mldccFromCookie === window.mldcc.split(":")[1]) {
                            clearInterval(intervalId);
                        }
                    }, 500);
                }
            }
        }
        checkAndUpdateMLDCC();
    </script>
